title: Turkish Delight Cheesecake
description: A rich and creamy cheesecake with a Turkish delight twist, perfect for a dinner dessert.
instructions: 2. Prepare the cheesecake crust by mixing ground almonds, 50g of granulated sugar, and 100g of melted butter.
3. Press the crust mixture into a 23cm springform pan.
4. In a blender, blend cream cheese, eggs, granulated sugar, sour cream, and vanilla extract until smooth.
5. Pour the cheesecake filling into the prepared pan over the crust.
6. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until the edges are set and the center is slightly jiggly.
7. Let the cheesecake cool completely in the pan.
8. Once cooled, top with crushed Turkish delight.
9. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours before serving.
10. Release the springform pan sides and slice the cheesecake to serve.
